title: Identify key features
text: To find the formula, identify the midline, amplitude, period, and phase shift from the table.

title: Calculate midline and amplitude
text: Recall that the midline D $$=$$ (Max + Min) / $$2$$ and the amplitude A $$=$$ (Max - Min) / $$2$$.

title: Determine the period
text: The period P is the horizontal distance for one complete cycle. Use P $$=$$ $$\frac{2\pi}{B}$$ to find B.

title: Choose function type and phase shift
text: Observe the function's behavior at $$x=0$$ to decide if it's a sine or cosine function and if there's a phase shift.

title: Function at $$x=0$$
text: At $$x=0$$, is the function at its midline, maximum, or minimum? Is it increasing or decreasing?
